title: Remove deprecated RX_POLL from protocol and servers
description: Delete polling code after push-based RX is working: (1) protocol.py: remove MSG_RX_POLL, encode_rx_poll, decode_rx_poll, RX_OK, RX_EMPTY, (2) renode_server.py: remove _handle_rx_poll(), (3) SX1262.cs: remove PollRx() and any polling timer. Grep for RX_POLL/0x20 to find all references.
acceptance_criteria: No RX_POLL references remain; 2-node test still passes with push-based RX
